name: Fractured Hannya
description: Notes An offense-focused ring that provides a moderate boost to HP and a significant boost to ATT at the expense of DEX. This can synergize well with weapons or abilities that increase in power with additional ATT like the Scepter of Devastation. Compared to the Faded Heart Scarab, ATT and DEX effects are swapped.
effects: +60 HP, +25% ATT equal to ATT, -15% DEX Equal to ATT
Increases the power of Syndicate weaponry if worn in conjunction
